task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "使用Sox工具检测音频质量"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "通过pydub库加载音频文件并获取基本信息（时长、声道数、采样率）"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "试听音频前30秒以验证清晰度"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "使用Whisper API进行语音转文字"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "使用Vosk库进行离线语音转文字"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "使用FFmpeg预处理音频并调用Google Speech API进行语音转文字"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "对低质量音频进行预处理（如调整采样率和声道数）"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "选择适合的语音识别方案（根据需求和环境）"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "生成主标题（基于首个段落内容）"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "生成分章节标题（基于每个段落的内容）"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "保存结构化文本到Markdown文件"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "添加时间戳标记到章节标题"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "audio_quality_check"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "playback_test"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node8", "type": "decision_making"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node4", "type": "select_whisper_api"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node5", "type": "select_vosk"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node6", "type": "select_google_speech"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node6", "type": "preprocess_audio"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node9", "type": "generate_main_title"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node10", "type": "generate_chapter_titles"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node12", "type": "add_timestamps"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node11", "type": "save_structured_text"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "save_structured_text"}]}
